message:
fix(node): detect unlisted artifacts in supply chain release verification

Add a check in verify_release() that flags artifacts present in the
input map but not listed in the manifest.  Previously, injecting an
extra artifact (e.g., malware binary) would pass verification because
only manifest-listed entries were checked.

The test for this scenario is updated from asserting overall_pass=true
(incorrect — it was a gap) to asserting overall_pass=false with the
unlisted artifact explicitly flagged in the results.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
